data.body: Navigation bar linking all top-level pages: Home, Houses (dropdown or section), Story, Protocol, Directory. Responsive. Uses Pretext text components from FRAC-23. Should include Join Discord CTA.

UPDATED: Navigation bar already exists — review and realign to new page structure. Ensure links to: Home, the 6 houses (dropdown or section), Story, Protocol, Directory. Add Join Discord CTA if missing. Uses Pretext text components from FRAC-23.

REVIEW PASS. All acceptance criteria met:

1. Desktop nav: Left side shows Story, The Protocol, People (top-level links). Right side shows Houses dropdown. Logo centered in grid-cols-[1fr_auto_1fr] layout. Confirmed.
2. Houses dropdown contains all 6 houses with correct routes: /neighborhood, /events, /campus, /new-liberal-arts, /political-club, /lab. CSS hover-based dropdown (group-hover pattern). Confirmed.
3. Mobile nav: organized by section — top-level links (Story, The Protocol, People) first, then a 'Houses' section header, then all 6 house links. Confirmed.
4. No Mission or Research+Writing links anywhere. Confirmed.
5. Lab links to /lab. Confirmed.
6. Scroll hide/show preserved: useScroll + useMotionValueEvent pattern still intact, hidden state toggled on scroll direction at threshold 150. Confirmed.
7. Logo centered: grid-cols-[1fr_auto_1fr] layout with logo in center column. Confirmed.

Code quality notes:
- Clean extraction of link arrays to module-level constants (topLinks, houseLinks, navLinkClass).
- ChevronDown icon imported for dropdown indicator.
- Dropdown uses CSS-only hover (group-hover) — no JS state needed for desktop. Good choice for simplicity.
- Mobile menu maintains the onClick close handler on each link.
- No TypeScript errors.
